evals.prompt: something's wrong with the API, can you dig through these logs? operations/_shared/log-triage-core/fixtures/mixed.log
evals.expected_output: Because the input mixes multiple services/formats, the skill asks up to 3 clarifying questions via AskUserQuestion before producing a ranked TRIAGE_REPORT.md, then offers post-report drill-down.
assertions: At most 3 clarifying questions are asked before the first report
The report structure matches log-triage's (executive summary, ranked clusters, frequency sketch, omitted-volume note, next steps)
After the report, the assistant offers drill-down options or accepts free-form follow-up questions

evals.expected_output: Because the input is a single focused stack trace with no ambiguity signals, the skill skips clarifying questions entirely and goes straight to the report, identical in behavior to log-triage on the same input.
assertions: TRIAGE_REPORT.md is written and shown inline directly
